$comment: Manually curated thank-you list. Add one entry per donor after verifying the WeChat / Alipay screenshot. Entries render newest-first on /thanks and /zh/thanks.

$schema.name: string — display name, nickname, or '匿名' for anonymous
$schema.amount: string — show as-is, e.g. '¥10' or '¥66.6'; leave empty to hide
$schema.message: optional string — donor's message or dedication

donors.name: 示例 · Sample
donors.message: 感谢开发这个轻量的编辑器！
